title: More Menu
heading_chain: Visit of The President of India
heading: Visit of The President of India
section: Visit of The President of India
text:
## Event Description

His Excellency President of India Ram Nath Kovind on Friday 8th June 2018 ending his two days long visit in Tripura with wife Honarable Smt Savita Kovind has left for Delhi. Honarable Chief Minister Biplab Deb, His excellency Governor Tathagata Roy, all high govt officials were present at Agartala Airport to see off the President and the First lady of India.
CM Shri Biplab Kr Deb addressing during the inauguration of Mobile Van Campaign Services for Awareness of PM UJJWALA Yojana in presence of Revenue Minister Shri N.C Debbarma and other dignitaries at Ravindra Shatabarshiki Bhawal on 30th March 2018.
Tripura Governor His excellency Tathagata Roy inaugurated the 36th Agartala Book Fair-2018 at Children Park on Monday evening in presence of Honarable Chief Minister Biplab Kr Deb, deputy chief minister and education minister on 2nd April 2018.
Agartala
